trigger_keywords: calor excesivo en el transporte de vino embotellado

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Bottled wine is exposed to excessive heat during transport.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Heat accelerates oxidation and other ageing reactions and can expand the wine and compromise the closure.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine may develop cooked flavours, lose freshness, and show premature oxidation.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine may develop cooked flavours, lose freshness, and show premature oxidation.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
